why.keep_all: user-ratified keep-all: 16/16 registered, 0 defect-side flags (qa_work/frame_metrics.json) — FWHM median 3.515 px (CV 7.4%), roundness 0.896, ~1530 stars/frame, bg span 2.1%; no defect class present.
why.weight_null: wFWHM weighting at low FWHM spread is worse than none (Siril -weight is a min-max ramp — the worst frame soft-culls at any spread; dead-ends).
